description: Draws a polygonal annotation connecting at least two anchor points. Creates a polygon by connecting the specified points in sequence with optional styling.
utility: Highlight or annotate polygonal regions in diagrams with multiple vertices

arguments.name: point1
arguments.description: First anchor point, specified as at(row, col)

arguments.name: point2
arguments.description: Second anchor point, specified as at(row, col)

arguments.name: additionalPoints
arguments.description: Additional anchor points for the polygon

arguments.name: style
arguments.description: Optional styling modifiers (c for color, s() for style, dash, fadeout, etc.)

alternates.syntax: annotationpoly(at(r1, c1), at(r2, c2), at(r3, c3), c(blue))
alternates.description: Triangle with three vertices and color

alternates.syntax: annotationpoly(at(r1, c1), at(r2, c2), at(r3, c3), at(r4, c4), at(r5, c5))

examples.expression: annotationpoly(at(2,2), at(2,5), at(3,6), at(4,5), at(4,2), dash())
